message:
test(proptest): add 22 property tests for swarm pipeline coverage gaps

Cover circuit breaker lifecycle (full state machine, counter accumulation,
HalfOpen→Open on failure), recovery policy non-retryable matching (empty list,
case sensitivity, multiple patterns), hook registry enable/disable and
phase-specific dispatch, pipeline validation edge cases (missing/cyclic deps,
ready_steps after completion), backoff edge cases (attempt=0, non-negative
guarantee), and PipelineExecutor execution properties (optional failing steps,
step_outcomes keys, timing invariants). 39→61 total tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
